title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox
summary: Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox said Anthropic's Mythos AI model found no further "serious bugs" in the privacy protocol following the patching of a previously discovered forgery bug.

title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
summary: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's "never sell" mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.

title: How Kalshi’s Lopes Lara Turned Kylie Jenner Gossip Into Billions
summary: The firm’s co-founder talks about the celebrity buzz that sparked her interest in prediction markets, the legal battles her firm faces and Jay-Z’s advice.

title: Google Sues Chinese Crime Group for Allegedly Using Gemini AI for Mass Phishing Scams
summary: Google alleges a Chinese network weaponized its Gemini AI to create phishing sites that stole millions of credit card numbers and targeted crypto investors.

title: AI Agent Rekts Dev on Bogus Scan, Leaves Them Begging for Crypto Donations
summary: A hobbyist network handed an autonomous agent a masterclass in why you don't give AI a credit card and a deadline.

title: Spot bitcoin ETFs snap five-day outflow streak with $85.8 million Friday inflow as ether funds keep sliding
summary: BlackRock's IBIT led Friday's inflows at $57.7 million, with Fidelity's FBTC adding $18.0 million, while no fund reported a net outflow on the day.

title: CFTC sues New Mexico in latest bid to assert authority over sports betting markets
